Hey everyone, I hope you're having an amazing day. In this video, I'm going to be going over the last push campaign. The campaign objective is to re-engage with potential clients that either canceled or no showed within your last sale cycle. Below this video, you'll find a button that links to this document that we are currently looking at. Within this document, you'll see that we have the Scipio Import Campaign ID, as well as instructions on how to import and edit the messages within that campaign. Below that, we have the text for each of those messages, so if you wanted to, you could just send these out manually through your cell phone. Hope that you enjoyed this video, and we'll see you in the next one.
